name: Oregon Trail Recreation Center
description: Oregon Trail Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Burley, ID. There are 12 wood courts. 6 are outdoors and 6 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights.
hours: M-F | Noon-4pm ©2012-2026 Oregon Trail Recreation District • (208) 678-6879 1750 Park Ave • Burley, ID 83318 Office Hours: Monday thru Friday from Noon to 4:00 p.m.

name: Patterson Picklebarn
description: Patterson Picklebarn is a place to play pickleball in Declo, ID. There are 2 indoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private. Amenities include lights, water, and restrooms.
